headline: Raymond James Sees Cross-Selling Ban as a Plus in Attracting Advisors
summary: Raymond James Private Client Group President Tash Elwyn echoed CEO Paul Shoukry’s aversion to cross-selling, saying recruits to the firm feel clients are left out in such product pushes.
